strengths: The agent empathized with the customer by saying 'I'm sorry to hear that. Let me look into your account right away.'
The agent provided a clear resolution to the issue by clearing the flag and reactivating the card.
The agent offered additional guidance by recommending the customer enable transaction notifications in the app.
improvements: The agent should check the card's status and limits using internal systems before making assumptions about the card being blocked.
The agent should avoid making statements that may come across as accusatory or assumptive.
The agent should focus on providing clear and concise explanations for the issue and the resolution.

rephrasing.original: It looks like the transaction was flagged by our fraud system. To be honest, your spending pattern looked suspicious so the system just blocks cards like yours automatically.
rephrasing.better: I've checked on your account and it appears that the transaction was flagged by our fraud system. I'm going to investigate further and clear the flag to reactivate your card.
